name: Creamy Turkey Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground raw turkey or sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook turkey or sausage and onion until meat is browned, stirring to break up the meat. Drain.
2. Stir in cream cheese until combined; add mushrooms and set aside.
3. For the crust: Lightly grease a 9 inch pie plate with non-stick spray. Unwrap biscuits and separate. Arrange biscuits in the pie plate, pressing onto the bottom and up the sides of the plate, extending the biscuits at 1/2 inch intervals if desired. Spoon turkey mixture into shell, spreading evenly.
4. In a blender or food processor, combine egg, cottage cheese, and flour. Cover and blend or process until smooth. Spoon over turkey mixture.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 25-30 minutes at 350°F or until edges are browned and filling is set. Let stand 5-10 minutes before cutting into wedges. Garnish with tomato slices and chives if desired.
6. Note: You may wish to add salt and pepper to taste.
